jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Cleartrip
jsonLd.description:
Cleartrip invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Cleartrip:
Cleartrip is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cleartrip!
